config.script:
"""
		Written By: Amit Ravat
		Written Date: 07/05/2024
		Purpose: If previous page not logged in then revert to login page. 
	"""
	try:
	#start of try block
		#If user is not Authenticate return to Login page
		previousPage = self.session.custom.IsTorqueMarkingAuthenticated
		if not previousPage:
			system.perspective.navigate('/')
		else:
			self.session.custom.TopViewHeader = "Torque Marking"
			self.getChild("root").getChild("ViewCanvas").props.instances = []
			self.getChild("root").getChild("ViewCanvas").props.style.cursor = "not-allowed"
			self.session.custom.demoInstances = []
#			system.perspective.openDock('leftNav')
		val=system.perspective.getSessionInfo()
	#End of try block
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Torque Marking'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Master Configuration/TorqueMarkingConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onStartup  -> Torque Marking')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

try:
		"""
			Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
			Written Date: 27/03/2024
			Purpose: Reset Form to Empty.
		"""
		self.parent.parent.parent.parent.getChild("ViewCanvas").props.instances = []
		self.view.params.count = 1
		self.parent.parent.parent.parent.getChild("ViewCanvas").custom.torqueRound = 1
		self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntOpInfo").getChild("cntImage").getChild("Image").custom.TorqueMarking = []
	#End of try block
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Torque Marking'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Master Configuration/TorqueMarkingConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:root/cntColumn/cntColumn/btnresetAll  -> Torque Marking')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

try:
		"""
			Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
			Written Date: 27/03/2024
			Purpose: Reset Last Marking.
		"""
		if self.view.custom.OPDefinition == 2:
			self.parent.parent.parent.parent.getChild("ViewCanvas").props.instances.pop()
			self.view.params.count = self.view.params.count - 1
			self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntOpInfo").getChild("cntImage").getChild("Image").custom.TorqueMarking.pop()
		elif self.view.custom.OPDefinition == 12:
			self.parent.parent.parent.parent.getChild("ViewCanvas").props.instances.pop()
			self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntOpInfo").getChild("cntImage").getChild("Image").custom.TorqueMarking.pop()
			count = self.view.params.count
			torqueRound = self.parent.parent.parent.parent.getChild("ViewCanvas").custom.torqueRound
			maxTag = self.parent.parent.parent.parent.getChild("ViewCanvas").custom.maxTag
			system.perspective.print("before count %s"%count)
			system.perspective.print("before torqueRound %s"%torqueRound)
			if self.view.params.count == 1:
				self.view.params.count = maxTag
				self.parent.parent.parent.parent.getChild("ViewCanvas").custom.torqueRound -= 1
			elif maxTag > (count - 1):
				self.view.params.count -= 1
			elif maxTag == (count - 1):
				self.view.params.count = maxTag
				self.parent.parent.parent.parent.getChild("ViewCanvas").custom.torqueRound -= 1
			count = self.view.params.count
			torqueRound = self.parent.parent.parent.parent.getChild("ViewCanvas").custom.torqueRound
			maxTag = self.parent.parent.parent.parent.getChild("ViewCanvas").custom.maxTag
			system.perspective.print("after count %s"%count)
			system.perspective.print("after torqueRound %s"%torqueRound)
	#End of try block
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Torque Marking'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Master Configuration/TorqueMarkingConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:root/cntColumn/cntColumn/btnresetLast  -> Torque Marking')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

try:
		"""
			Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
			Written Date: 27/03/2024
			Purpose: Save Marking Done on Image.
		"""
		TorqueMarking = self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntOpInfo").getChild("cntImage").getChild("Image").custom.TorqueMarking
		TorqueList = []
		Opcode=self.view.custom.OPCodeId
		for mark in TorqueMarking:
			TorqueList.append(mark)
		Id = self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntOpInfo").getChild("cntImage").getChild("Image").custom.ImageId
		ModifiedBy = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		params={'TorqueMarking':TorqueList,'Id':Id,'ModifiedBy':ModifiedBy}
		dataset = system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/TorqueMarking/UpdateTorqueMarking',params)
		for data in dataset:
			result = data['Result']
		if result == 1:
			message = "Torque Marking saved successfully."
			state = "success"
			auditMsg= message + " for ImageID=" + str(Id) + ",OpcodeId=" + str(Opcode)
			#addToAuditLogStart
			system.perspective.print(auditMsg)
			category='Master Configuration'
			subCategory='Tarque Marking Configuration'
			description=str(auditMsg)
			createdBy=self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
			Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddAuditLogs(category, subCategory, description, createdBy)
			#addAuditLogEnd
			
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
		payload ={'OPCodeId':self.view.custom.OPCodeId}
		system.perspective.sendMessage('populateImageFlexRepeater',payload=payload,scope='page')
		self.parent.parent.parent.parent.getChild("ViewCanvas").props.instances = []
		self.view.params.count = 1
		self.parent.parent.parent.parent.getChild("ViewCanvas").custom.torqueRound = 1
		self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntOpInfo").getChild("cntImage").getChild("Image").custom.TorqueMarking = []
		
		
	#End of try block
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Torque Marking'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Master Configuration/TorqueMarkingConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:root/cntColumn/cntColumn/btnSave  -> Torque Marking')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	try:
		"""
			Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
			Written Date: 27/03/2024
			Purpose: Populate Image for selection and Marking Torque .
		"""
		self.parent.parent.getChild("cntOpInfo").getChild("cntImage").getChild("Image").props.source = "/system/images/VECV/no-image-available.png"
		self.view.params.count = 1
		self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("ViewCanvas").custom.maxTag = 0
		self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("ViewCanvas").props.instances = []
		self.parent.parent.getChild("cntOpInfo").getChild("cntImage").getChild("Image").custom.TorqueMarking = []
		self.parent.parent.getChild("cntOpInfo").getChild("cntImage").getChild("Image").custom.ImageId = ''
		self.parent.parent.getChild("cntOpInfo").getChild("cntImage").getChild("Image").custom.ImageName = ''
		self.parent.parent.getChild("cntOpInfo").getChild("cntImage").getChild("Image").custom.ImageName = ''
		OPCodeId = payload['OPCodeId']
		OPDefinition = payload['OPDefinition']
		self.view.custom.OPCodeId = OPCodeId
		self.view.custom.OPDefinition = OPDefinition
		params={'OPCodeId':OPCodeId, 'MST_OPDefinition_Id' : OPDefinition}
		Result=system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/TorqueMarking/getImageDetails",params)
		Instance = []
		for i in Result:
			dict = 	  {
			    "instanceStyle": {
			      "classes": ""
			    },
			    "instancePosition": {},
			    "url": i['ImagePath'],
			    "ImageId": i['MST_OPDefinitionTorque_Id'],
			    "ImageName": i['ImageName'],
			    "TorqueMarking": i['TorqueMarking'],
			    "TorqueQuantity":i['TorqueQuantity']
			  }
			Instance.append(dict)
		self.props.instances = Instance
		if len(Instance) < 1:
			message = "No Images found for the above Filters."
			state = "Warning"
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")	
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Torque Marking'
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Master Configuration/TorqueMarkingConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Message Handler:populateImageFlexRepeater -> cntColumn/ImageFlexRepeater') 
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

config.script:
try:
		"""
			Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
			Written Date: 27/03/2024
			Purpose: Torqur marking and counting.
		"""
		system.perspective.print("self.view.custom.OPDefinition %s"%self.view.custom.OPDefinition)
		system.perspective.print("self.view.params.count %s"%self.view.params.count)
		if len(self.parent.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntColumn").getChild("ImageFlexRepeater").props.instances) > 0:
			if self.view.custom.OPDefinition == 2:
				maxTag = self.custom.maxTag
				count = self.view.params.count
				if count <= maxTag:
					yourViewPath =  "Project_VECV/Templates/torque" #change this to your view of th cricle thingy
					#set co-ordinate for marking
					baseInstance = {
					  "position": "absolute",
					  "top": event.clientY - 245,
					  "left": event.clientX - 640,
					  "bottom": "auto",
					  "right": "auto",
					  "zIndex": "auto",
					  "width": "auto",
					  "height": "auto",
					  "viewPath": yourViewPath,
					  "viewParams": {
					  	  "torque": count ,
					  	  "color": '#000000'
					  	},
					  "style": {
					    "classes": ""
					  }
					}
					#set co-ordinate for saving marking for Operator Screen
					self.props.instances.append(baseInstance)
					newbaseInstance = {
					  "position": "absolute",
					  "top": event.clientY - 240,
					  "left": event.clientX - 640,
					  "bottom": "auto",
					  "right": "auto",
					  "zIndex": "auto",
					  "width": "auto",
					  "height": "auto",
					  "viewPath": yourViewPath,
					  "viewParams": {
					  	  "torque": count,
					  	  "color": '#000000'
					  	},
					  "style": {
					    "classes": ""
					  }
					}
					self.parent.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntOpInfo").getChild("cntImage").getChild("Image").custom.TorqueMarking.append(newbaseInstance)
					count +=1
					self.view.params.count = count
			elif self.view.custom.OPDefinition == 12:
				maxTag = self.custom.maxTag
				torqueRound = self.custom.torqueRound
				count = self.view.params.count
				system.perspective.print("before torqueRound %s"%torqueRound)
				system.perspective.print("before count %s"%count)
				if count <= maxTag and torqueRound <=2:
					yourViewPath =  "Project_VECV/Templates/torque" #change this to your view of th cricle thingy
					#set co-ordinate for marking
					baseInstance = {
					  "position": "absolute",
					  "top": event.clientY - 245,
					  "left": event.clientX - 640,
					  "bottom": "auto",
					  "right": "auto",
					  "zIndex": "auto",
					  "width": "auto",
					  "height": "auto",
					  "viewPath": yourViewPath,
					  "viewParams": {
					  	  "torque": count ,
					  	  "color": '#000000'
					  	},
					  "style": {
					    "classes": ""
					  }
					}
					#set co-ordinate for saving marking for Operator Screen
					self.props.instances.append(baseInstance)
					newbaseInstance = {
					  "position": "absolute",
					  "top": event.clientY - 240,
					  "left": event.clientX - 640,
					  "bottom": "auto",
					  "right": "auto",
					  "zIndex": "auto",
					  "width": "auto",
					  "height": "auto",
					  "viewPath": yourViewPath,
					  "viewParams": {
					  	  "torque": count,
					  	  "color": '#000000'
					  	},
					  "style": {
					    "classes": ""
					  }
					}
					if maxTag == count and self.custom.torqueRound != 2:
						self.custom.torqueRound+=1
						count = 0
						self.view.params.count= count
					elif maxTag == count and self.custom.torqueRound == 2:
						count = self.custom.maxTag
						self.custom.torqueRound = 3
						system.perspective.print("after torqueRound -->%s"%torqueRound)
						system.perspective.print("after count -->%s"%count)
					self.parent.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntOpInfo").getChild("cntImage").getChild("Image").custom.TorqueMarking.append(newbaseInstance)
					count +=1
					self.view.params.count = count		
					
					torqueRound = self.custom.torqueRound
					count = self.view.params.count
					system.perspective.print("after torqueRound %s"%torqueRound)
					system.perspective.print("after count %s"%count)
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Torque Marking'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Master Configuration/TorqueMarkingConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:root/ViewCanvas  -> Torque Marking')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

messageHandlers.script:
try:
		# implement your handler here
		"""
			Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
			Written Date: 27/03/2024
			Purpose: Select image where torque has to be marked.
		"""
		torque = {}
		url = payload['url']
		self.props.style.cursor = 'pointer'
		self.parent.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntOpInfo").getChild("cntImage").getChild("Image").props.source = url
		self.parent.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntOpInfo").getChild("cntImage").getChild("Image").custom.ImageId = payload['ImageId']
		self.parent.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntOpInfo").getChild("cntImage").getChild("Image").custom.ImageName = payload['ImageName']
		torque = payload['TorqueMarking']
		TorqueQuantity = payload["TorqueQuantity"]
		if str(TorqueQuantity).lower() == str(None).lower():
			self.custom.maxTag = 0
		else:
			self.custom.maxTag = TorqueQuantity
		import ast
		TorqueMarking = ast.literal_eval(torque)
		instances = []
		if payload['TorqueMarking'] is not None:
			self.parent.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntOpInfo").getChild("cntImage").getChild("Image").custom.TorqueMarking = TorqueMarking
			for mark in TorqueMarking:
				mark['top'] = int(mark['top']) - 5
				instances.append(mark)
			self.props.instances = instances
			if self.view.custom.OPDefinition == 2:
				self.view.params.count =  len(instances) + 1
			else:
				system.perspective.print("len(instances) %s"%len(instances))
				system.perspective.print("self.custom.maxTag %s"%self.custom.maxTag)
				if self.custom.maxTag == len(instances):
					self.view.params.count =  len(instances) + 1
					self.custom.torqueRound = 2
				elif self.custom.maxTag > len(instances):
					self.view.params.count =  len(instances) + 1
					self.custom.torqueRound = 1
				else:
					self.view.params.count = len(instances) - self.custom.maxTag + 1
					self.custom.torqueRound = 3
					
		else:
			self.props.instances = []
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Torque Marking'
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Master Configuration/TorqueMarkingConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Message Handler:ImageSelect -> root/ViewCanvas') 
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block
